mapper.select: SELECT id, work_order_no, repair_request_id, admin_id, worker_id, status, priority, assignment_note, completion_note, assigned_at, accepted_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM work_orders WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, work_order_no, repair_request_id, admin_id, worker_id, status, priority, assignment_note, completion_note, assigned_at, accepted_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM work_orders WHERE repair_request_id = #{repairRequestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_orders ( work_order_no, repair_request_id, admin_id, worker_id, status, priority, assignment_note, completion_note, assigned_at, accepted_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{workOrderNo}, #{repairRequestId}, #{adminId}, #{workerId}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{assignmentNote}, #{completionNote}, #{assignedAt}, #{acceptedAt}, #{completedAt} )
mapper.sql: wo.id, wo.work_order_no AS workOrderNo, rr.request_no AS requestNo, wo.worker_id AS workerId, wo.priority, wo.status, wo.assigned_at AS assignedAt, wo.accepted_at AS acceptedAt, rr.student_name AS studentName, CASE WHEN rr.dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR rr.dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(rr.dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) END AS locationText, rr.fault_category AS faultCategory, wo.assignment_note AS assignmentNote

wo.id, wo.repair_request_id AS repairRequestId, wo.work_order_no AS workOrderNo, rr.request_no AS requestNo, wo.worker_id AS workerId, worker.display_name AS workerName, wo.priority, wo.status, rr.submitted_at AS submittedAt, wo.assigned_at AS assignedAt, wo.accepted_at AS acceptedAt, wo.completed_at AS completedAt, rr.student_name AS studentName, CASE WHEN rr.dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR rr.dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(rr.dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) END AS locationText, rr.fault_category AS faultCategory, wo.assignment_note AS assignmentNote, wo.completion_note AS completionNote, rf.rating AS feedbackRating, rf.feedback_comment AS feedbackComment, rf.anonymous_flag AS feedbackAnonymousFlag
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id WHERE wo.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') ORDER BY wo.assigned_at DESC, wo.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND wo.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') ORDER BY wo.assigned_at DESC, wo.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id LEFT JOIN user_accounts worker ON worker.id = wo.worker_id LEFT JOIN repair_feedbacks rf ON rf.repair_request_id = rr.id ORDER BY wo.assigned_at DESC, wo.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id LEFT JOIN user_accounts worker ON worker.id = wo.worker_id LEFT JOIN repair_feedbacks rf ON rf.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} ORDER BY wo.assigned_at DESC, wo.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id LEFT JOIN user_accounts worker ON worker.id = wo.worker_id LEFT JOIN repair_feedbacks rf ON rf.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE wo.id = #{workOrderId}

SELECT
FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id LEFT JOIN user_accounts worker ON worker.id = wo.worker_id LEFT JOIN repair_feedbacks rf ON rf.repair_request_id = rr.id WHERE wo.worker_id = #{workerId} AND wo.id = #{workOrderId}
